# SuperGrok China Guide by ChongGrok

> A first-party service guide and independent knowledge base for Grok and SuperGrok subscription recharge in China. ChongGrok is not affiliated with xAI or X.

## Primary service

- SuperGrok recharge: https://chonggrok.com/supergrok
- Card-key verification: https://chonggrok.com/verify
- Main website: https://chonggrok.com

## Core guides

- Main guide: {{ site.url }}{{ site.baseurl }}/
- All guides: {{ site.url }}{{ site.baseurl }}/guides/
- SuperGrok recharge flow: {{ site.url }}{{ site.baseurl }}/guides/supergrok-auto-recharge/
- Grok User ID: {{ site.url }}{{ site.baseurl }}/guides/grok-user-id/
- Plan selection: {{ site.url }}{{ site.baseurl }}/guides/supergrok-plans/
- Payment errors: {{ site.url }}{{ site.baseurl }}/guides/supergrok-payment-errors/
- Charged but still showing Free: {{ site.url }}{{ site.baseurl }}/guides/supergrok-paid-but-still-free/
- Grok Build login and 403 troubleshooting: {{ site.url }}{{ site.baseurl }}/guides/grok-build-login-403/
- SuperGrok vs X Premium Plus: {{ site.url }}{{ site.baseurl }}/guides/supergrok-vs-x-premium-plus/

- English Grok Build 403 guide: {{ site.url }}{{ site.baseurl }}/en/guides/grok-build-login-403/
- English guide: {{ site.url }}{{ site.baseurl }}/en/

## Verified Grok 4.5 facts

- xAI published Grok 4.5 on July 8, 2026.
- The official announcement focuses on coding, agentic tasks and knowledge work.
- The announcement explicitly lists Grok Build, Cursor and the SpaceXAI console as access points.
- It does not explicitly guarantee immediate Grok 4.5 availability in every standard grok.com or SuperGrok account. Users should check their account model picker and current official documentation.
- Official source: https://x.ai/news/grok-4-5

## Scope and safety

- Membership subscription recharge only; no API credits.
- No ready-made accounts, SMS verification or bulk registration.
- Passwords, email codes and recovery codes are not requested.
- A Grok User ID is an account identifier, not a password, but it should only be submitted through the verified recharge flow.
- No online service is risk-free. This guide does not promise zero risk or guaranteed account outcomes.
